priceMatch.title: Found a Better Price?
priceMatch.description: We'll help you find the best flight cashback rates. Compare prices across booking sites and maximize your savings on every flight.

items.question: How do I earn cashback on flight bookings?
items.answer: Simply click through Cashog to your preferred flight booking site, complete your reservation as usual, and cashback will be automatically tracked and added to your account.

items.question: Can I combine cashback with airline miles?
items.answer: Yes! Most flight booking sites allow you to earn both cashback and airline miles simultaneously. Just make sure to enter your frequent flyer number during checkout.

items.question: How long does flight cashback take to confirm?
items.answer: Flight cashback typically takes 30-45 days to confirm after your flight is completed. This accounts for cancellation periods and flight verification.

items.question: What if I need to cancel my flight?
items.answer: If you cancel a flight, the cashback will not be credited. If you've already received it, it will be deducted from your account.

items.question: Do all flights qualify for cashback?
items.answer: Most flights on our partner sites qualify, but some exclusions may apply (e.g., basic economy, certain airlines). Check site terms for details.

items.question: Can I earn cashback on international flights?
items.answer: Yes! International flights are eligible for cashback on most partner sites. Rates may vary by route and airline.

items.question: What about business and first class?
items.answer: Yes! Premium cabin bookings qualify for cashback at the same rates as economy flights.

items.question: Do I need to book directly through Cashog every time?
items.answer: Yes, to ensure cashback tracking, you must start your booking session by clicking through Cashog to the partner site.

items.question: Can I earn cashback on flight upgrades?
items.answer: Yes, seat upgrades and baggage fees paid during booking typically qualify for cashback as well.

items.question: What about round-the-world tickets?
items.answer: Multi-city and round-the-world tickets are eligible for cashback on most partner sites. Rates apply to the total booking amount.

final.title: Start Saving on Flights Today
final.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers earning cashback on every flight booking
